hooks.command:
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *packages/HimalayaUI/frontend/src/*.ts|*packages/HimalayaUI/frontend/src/*.tsx|*packages/HimalayaUI/frontend/test/*.ts|*packages/HimalayaUI/frontend/test/*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/packages/HimalayaUI/frontend" && out=$(./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.build.json 2>&1 | head -40); if [ -n "$out" ]; then printf '
TSC errors after edit:
%s
' "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac

hooks.description: Block Manifest.toml edits — gitignored, re-resolves in worktrees
hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */Manifest.toml) echo 'BLOCKED: Manifest.toml is gitignored and worktrees re-resolve against the registry, pulling old Himalaya v0.4.5 with a different findpeaks signature. See CLAUDE.md > Himalaya core resolution in worktrees. If you really need to edit, copy from main first.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
